stemHtml: When flying through narrow valleys or terrain funnels the Venturi effect can influence the indications of an airspeed indicator (ASI). Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: The ASI indicates values that are too high.
options.b: The ASI shows higher values only when there is a tailwind.
options.c: The ASI shows higher values, the wider the valley becomes.
options.d: The ASI shows increasingly lower values, the narrower the valley becomes.
